parameters-en.Blend: Controls how much of the 12-String effect is blended in with the dry signal.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the bass response of the effected signal.
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the treble response of the effected signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.PluckType: Optimizes the 12 String emulation for specific types of playing styles.
